field.label: Xtras
field.expression: select count(*) from RH_AUTH_EXTRAS_DETAIL AS RH where RH.legajo = FICHADADIA.legajo and RH.desdeFecha <= FICHADADIA.fecha and RH.hastaFecha >= FICHADADIA.fecha limit 1

field.label: extras Brutas1
field.expression: TIMEDIFF( ADDTIME(timediff(h2, h1) , ifnull(timediff(h4,h3),0)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))

field.label: Hora_sal
field.expression: @horasal:= (case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end)

field.label: Entrada trunca
field.expression: @entrada_trunca:= (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)

field.label: salida trunca
Madrugo
field.expression: case when TIMEDIFF(hingreso, h1) > '00:55:00' then 1 else 0 end

field.label: quedo
field.expression: case when TIMEDIFF(@horasal, hegreso) > '01:00:00' then 1 else 0 end

field.label: trabajadas
Extras 50
field.expression:
CASE when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF(@salida_trunca, @entrada_trunca) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) > 0 and (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF(@salida_trunca, @entrada_trunca) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) <= FICHADADIA.max_extras_50
then (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF(@salida_trunca, @entrada_trunca) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF(@salida_trunca, @entrada_trunca) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) > FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 then FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 else 0 end

field.label: Extras 100
field.expression: CASE when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF(@salida_trunca, @entrada_trunca) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) > FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 then (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF(@salida_trunca, @entrada_trunca) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) - FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 else 0 end

field.label: Valor hora
field.expression: select importe FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.desfec <= FICHADADIA.fecha and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = (select CATEGHISTORIA.idCateg from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona and CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde <= FICHADADIA.fecha order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde DESC limit 1) order by CONCEPCONV.desfec DESC limit 1

select tipoliq FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = PERSONAL.IdCateg limit 1
field.label: Tipo Liq.
